taxonomy: Delphinastrum virescens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Cardueae and the subfamily Carduoideae. The plant is native to South Africa and is known for its unique characteristics. Further classification places it in the genus Delphinastrum, which is a part of the broader plant kingdom. The exact classification of Delphinastrum virescens can be broken down into its binomial nomenclature as a species of the kingdom Plantae.
